headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Camden Prop Trust, Lowers Price Target to $106
summary: UBS  analyst Michael Goldsmith   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $108 to $106.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Camden Property Trust Stock?
summary: Despite Camden Property Trust's underperformance relative to the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Commercial Metals, Doximity, Draftkings, Hut 8, Illumina, Lowe’s, TeraWulf, Starbucks, Whirlpool, Wix.com, and More

headline: Scotiabank Downgrades Camden Prop Trust to Sector Underperform, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   downgrades Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) from Sector Perform to Sector Underperform and lowers the price target from $113 to $95.
